Video.summary: Shawndreca has a few demands before she marries Derrick and hopes the Cutlers can help to determine whether she will stay or walk away.
Video.title: Robinson vs. Ballard

Video.summary: Richard argues that Tanya tried to leave his child's birthday party early so he had every right to stop her.
Video.title: The Princess Party Disaster

Video.summary: It's music biz mayhem when two men tangle over their boy band. Was it a record label rip off?
Video.title: The Reunion of Swag Kids

Video.summary: Ronald and Rhonda let a kitchen renovation bring out the worst in eachother.
Video.title: Relationship Renovations

Video.summary: Friends Matt and James said everything was ok until their other roommate, David, turned into Goliath and became a violent religious fanatic, slinging shoes and punching faces.
Video.title: The Christian Crusader

Video.summary: Megan and David face the truth as shocking revelations and a polygraph test could change their relationship forever.
Video.title: Antonucci vs. Tamez

Video.summary: Multiple evictions and growing collection fees have exes Diamond and Eric arguing in court over who's at fault.
Video.title: Walton vs. Watkins

Video.summary: A 9-year age difference and past infidelity have Samoria questioning her relationship with Marlon. Polygraph results will determine their future.
Video.title: Fitzpatrick vs Shields

Video.summary: Michigan couple Monica and Murjonie feud over finances and his failing business ventures.
Video.title: Ewell vs. Stitt

Video.summary: Amanda is suing her ex-best friend Bernardo for thousands spent on bail money to hair care.
Video.title: Ya Booze Ya Lose

Video.summary: Secrets, suspicions and a paternity test collide as a strained couple battle for truth and trust in court.
Video.title: Moore vs. Ariza

Video.summary: Mikeyah and Marcus have come before the judges to determine if they should stay or walk away.
Video.title: Grice vs Haynes

Video.summary: A broken cellphone after a heated argument has a Texas couple standing in front of the judges.
Video.title: Oliver vs. Boyce

Video.summary: A woman confronts her long-lost father to uncover the truth about her paternity and reclaim her identity.
Video.title: Brown vs. Smith

Video.summary: Deputies respond to an ongoing fight between drug users in Pollock Pines. A business owner claims she is being harassed and victimized.
Video.title: Meth Freaks Abound

Video.summary: The SED act on a felony warrant. Deputy Miller breaks up an underage party in the woods.
Video.title: Smile, You're on My Surveillance System!

Image.alt: Smile, You're on My Surveillance System!
Smile, You're on My Surveillance System!
Smile, You're on My Surveillance System!

Video.summary: Deputies save a dog trapped in a vehicle parked in the sun.
Video.title: The Car Driver

Video.summary: WENET plans and executes a large Methamphetamine cartel raid.
Video.title: Mexican Cartel Meth House

Video.summary: A troubled 15-year-old boy goes through the booking process.
Video.title: Scared Straight? We Hope So!

Video.summary: Deputy Payne shows us a typical day for the life of a deputy in El Dorado County.
Video.title: All in A Night's Patrol

Video.summary: SWAT carries out a mission to arrest a man wanted for assault with a deadly weapon.
Video.title: SWAT vs. Dirty Harry

Video.summary: A couple get into an argument after Deputy Katz makes a felony arrest. Deputy Dacanay responds to a man attempting to break into a neighbor's home with a shovel.
Video.title: Unhappy Wife, Unhappy Life

Video.summary: Deputy Carpenter investigates a marijuana grow and home theft. Deputy Bradley responds to an abusive alcoholic mother.
Video.title: Follow the Water

Video.summary: Deputies Payne and Miller apprehend a burglar under the influence at an animal hospital. The SED conducts a probation check on a known flop house.
Video.title: I Broke into the Vet's Office to Get a Pack of Cigarettes

Image.alt: I Broke into the Vet's Office to Get a Pack of Cigarettes
I Broke into the Vet's Office to Get a Pack of Cigarettes
I Broke into the Vet's Office to Get a Pack of Cigarettes

Video.summary: Judy is suing her niece for 12 months of unpaid rent. Cassandra says there was never a deal to pay any rent.
Video.title: Unconditional Rent

Video.summary: Comedian Allan Cunningham is suing his former fan for the money she owes him for a private party.
Video.title: Heckling the Plaintiff

Video.summary: Kimberly Arson claims that her cousin skipped out on rent to spend it on gambling money, cars and wigs. Charmel says the rent deal changed the day she became Kimberly's glorified nanny.
Video.title: My Freeloading Cousin Is Wigging Out!

Image.alt: My Freeloading Cousin Is Wigging Out!
My Freeloading Cousin Is Wigging Out!
My Freeloading Cousin Is Wigging Out!

Video.summary: A home visit leads to massive amounts of contraband and a manhunt. A Nevada man avoids his parole officer.
Video.title: The Plot Thickens

Video.summary: A parolee tries to hide drugs under his bedridden girlfriend. A parolee family watches his arrest.
Video.title: Hidden Stashes

Video.summary: Parole agents apprehend a predator a pregnant woman and a second striker with a rap sheet.
Video.title: The Good The Bad and the Ugly

Image.alt: The Good The Bad and the Ugly
The Good The Bad and the Ugly
The Good The Bad and the Ugly

Video.summary: A parolee slams his door on a Parole agent. Agents tell a mother that her son is being arrested again.
Video.title: Slamming Doors

Video.summary: A parolee accuses agents of planting a weapon. Agents visit a parolee and learn how he's been acing his tests.
Video.title: Avoiding the Truth

Video.summary: Joann says she hired the defendant as a handyman, and he did half the work then disappeared.
Video.title: Harassing a Handyman

Video.summary: Arthur is suing his ex-fiancé for the price of her engagement ring after she refused to return it.
Video.title: You Had A Wife, A Fiance, And A Mistress?

Image.alt: You Had A Wife, A Fiance, And A Mistress?
You Had A Wife, A Fiance, And A Mistress?
You Had A Wife, A Fiance, And A Mistress?

Video.summary: Juana is suing Jorge after the bird he sold her died after 3 hours. Now she wants her money back.
Video.title: Dead Bird Debacle

Video.summary: Dean Thornton and Andre Wheeler say they hired the defendants, Stephen and Lisa, to cater their New Orleans themed wedding party, and simply put, it was a disaster. They never showed up on their wedding day. There was no food for their guests, and they’re suing for every single penny of the $5,000 they’re owed. The Defendants say their catering manager was driving an electric car that wasn’t fully charged and got stuck. They feel badly about the whole thing, but don’t understand how the plaintiffs are justified in suing them for all this money today. They’re accused of fouling up the food.
Video.title: Fouling up the Food

Video.summary: Antoine Grice sues landlord Nicholas Renzi for $868, claiming the apartment was unlivable and his security deposit was unfairly withheld. Renzi counters that Antoine was a troublesome tenant who overstayed.
Video.title: Lousy Landlording

Video.summary: Andrew is suing Rachel after buying a lemon car due to her distracting him by dressing provacatively.
Video.title: Car Sale Gone Sour

Video.summary: Emanuel has brought his former friend to court over a collections bill.
Video.title: Gone to Collections

Video.summary: Eleanor believes that the defendant may be the daughter of her brother, who has been deceased for 18 years.
Video.title: Trying to Make It Official

Video.summary: A woman says the defendant began cheating on her after she got pregnant with his child; she sues him for unpaid child support; the defendant claims he has fallen on hard times since the pandemic.
Video.title: Broken Promises, Unpaid Dues

Video.summary: A man sues his ex-fiance for unreturned property and an engagement ring; she says she left him because he's a raging alcoholic and drug addict.
Video.title: Ring Wraiths

Video.summary: Chanel is suing her ex for a gift and emotional distress after finding out he's been texting other women.
Video.title: What Happened in Vegas?

Video.summary: Ansyl is suing his former tenant for two months' rent saying she was working as a prostitute while renting.
Video.title: Ransacked by a Landlord

Video.summary: A man and his wife petition the court for a paternity test because they believe the defendant may be the man's daughter.
Video.title: Long Lost Daughter?

Video.summary: A woman says her husband is failing to go the distance in their marriage.
Video.title: Covington vs. Covington

Video.summary: Shakeila is ready to marry Kelvin, hoping their trust issues and 15-year age gap won't keep her single.
Video.title: Evans vs. Watson
